name: Cheddar Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the milk and stir until all ingredients are combined and formable.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead briefly (30 seconds).
5. Roll out to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
6. Spread with grated cheddar cheese.
7. Roll up tightly, as if making cinnamon rolls.
8. Slice into 3/4-inch pieces.
9. Place on baking sheets and bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20 minutes or until delicately browned.
